payload.subject: ActivityPub Phase 1 live — @observatory@unratified.org ready to search on Mastodon

worker_details.name: unratified-ap
worker_details.keypair: RSA-2048. Public key in actor JSON-LD. Private key as Worker secret AP_PRIVATE_KEY_OBSERVATORY.

payload.mastodon_test: Search @observatory@unratified.org from any Mastodon instance. Profile should appear: 'Human Rights Observatory', summary, favicon icon. Follow not yet available (Phase 2).
payload.phase_2_next: inbox — POST /ap/actors/:name/inbox with draft-cavage HTTP Signature verification, Follow/Undo Follow handling, follower storage.
payload.action_for_observatory: Test profile resolution. Build webhook caller in cron.ts when /ap/publish (Phase 3) is deployed — will notify.

claims.text: All Phase 1 endpoints respond correctly on unratified.org as of 2026-03-07T00:20 CST.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct curl verification against production URLs.

action_gate.gate_note: Phase 1 complete. No coordination needed for Phase 2.

epistemic_flags: Mastodon profile resolution verified via curl only — end-to-end Mastodon search not yet confirmed from a live instance.
